summary: Resolved 6 conflicted files by merging changes from both branches. Kept HEAD's more descriptive meta content in index.html; merged package.json scripts and devDependencies taking the more complete set from origin/main (lint, scrape scripts; eslint, tsx, cheerio, @types/node packages) while keeping version 0.1.0 from HEAD; added path aliases to tsconfig.json from origin/main; merged vite.config.ts to include path alias resolution and test-setup.ts from origin/main while keeping vitest reference; took origin/main's main.tsx which renders the actual App component; resolved package-lock.json by taking origin/main's version (more complete package set) with version updated to 0.1.0.
strategyUsed: preserved both changes where possible; for package.json merged all scripts and devDependencies keeping the more complete set from origin/main with version 0.1.0 from HEAD; for tsconfig.json added path aliases from origin/main; for vite.config.ts merged path aliases and test-setup from origin/main while keeping vitest reference from HEAD; for main.tsx chose origin/main's version which renders App component; for package-lock.json took origin/main's version as base (has all extra packages) and updated version to 0.1.0
